Aditya Akella

Professor & Regents Chair Â· ACM Fellow
Director: LDOS & InfraAI

I'm interested in rethinking systems infrastructure through the lens of advanced AI. I lead two centers doing this work: the Learning Directed Operating System (LDOS) project, an NSF CISE Expedition in Computing reimagining the OS for data-driven decision-making, and the InfraAI Center, an industryâUT collaborative effort to build systems infrastructure from the ground up for next-gen AI.

I also co-lead the UTNS Lab. I'm married to Shuchi Chawla.

Email: akella@cs.utexas.edu
Twitter: @adityaakella
LinkedIn: Aditya Akella

Recent Highlights

Jun 2026 MatchBox wins Distinguished Paper Award at PLDI 2026!
Nov 2025 Excited to launch the InfraAI Center!
May 2024 LDOS NSF Expedition in Computing awarded. See NSF and UT Austin press releases.
Jan 2024 Became an ACM Fellow.

Recent Work — full list

OSDI 26
Mimesys: Generating Realistic Executable Testing Environments from Resource Usage Traces
Donghyun Kim, Zichao Hu, Joydeep Biswas, Aditya Akella, Daehyeok Kim.
OSDI 26
TrainMover: An Interruption-Resilient and Reliable ML Training Runtime
ChonLam Lao, Minlan Yu, Aditya Akella, Jiamin Cao, Yu Guan, Pengcheng Zhang, Zhilong Zheng, Yichi Xu, Ennan Zhai, Dennis Cai, Jiaqi Gao.
ICML 26
When Do Graph Foundation Models Transfer? A Data-Centric Theory
J. Zhu*, Y. Chen, P. Wang*, Y. He, P. Li, A. Akella, and Z. Wang.
PLDI 26
MatchBox: A Semantic Foundation for Data Plane Portability Distinguished Paper Award
Eric Hayden Campbell, Robert Zhang, Divyanshu Saxena, Aditya Akella, Isil Dillig.
ACL 26
Improving the Throughput of Diffusion-based Large Language Models via a Training-Free Confidence-Aware Calibration
Jack Shen*, Gaurav Sarkar*, Yeonju Ro, Sharath Nittur Sridhar, Zhangyang Wang, Aditya Akella, Souvik Kundu.
NSDI 26
UNUM: A New Framework for Network Control
Jiayi Chen, Nihal Sharma, Debajit Chakraborty, Saurabh Agarwal, Jeffrey Zhou, Aditya Akella, Sanjay Shakkottai.
NSDI 26
Towards Performance Robustness for Microservices
Divyanshu Saxena, Gaurav Vipat, Jiaxin Lin, Jingbo Wang, Isil Dillig, Sanjay Shakkottai, Aditya Akella.
NSDI 26
SYMPHONY: Improving Memory Management for LLM Inference Workloads
Saurabh Agarwal, Bodun Hu, Anyong Mao, Aditya Akella, Shivaram Venkataraman.
NSDI 26
Express Lane to Efficiency and Reliability: Multi-Dimensional Control in Meta's Express Backbone Network
Faisal Iqbal, Vitaly Neganov, Brian Chang, Rong Rong, Yuanjun Yao, Marek Denis, Qin Zhang, Alexandru Manea, Anton Marchenko, Ulas Kozat, Aditya Akella, Ying Zhang.
EuroSys 26
Canopy: Property-Driven Learning for Congestion Control
Chenxi Yang, Divyanshu Saxena, Rohit Dwivedula, Kshiteej Mahajan, Swarat Chaudhuri, and Aditya Akella.
